title: FROG Canonical Source Schema
description: Conservative machine-checkable structural schema for canonical .frog source. This schema covers top-level canonical source shape and section kind constraints only. It does not define full semantic validity, Execution IR, lowering, backend contracts, or runtime realization.

spec_version.description: Specification version identifier for the canonical source file.

metadata.description: Metadata section. Section-local object structure is owned by Expression/Metadata.md.

interface.description: Interface section. Section-local object structure is owned by Expression/Interface.md.

diagram.description: Diagram section. Section-local object structure is owned by Expression/Diagram.md.

connector.description: Optional connector section. Section-local object structure is owned by Expression/Connector.md.

front_panel.description: Optional front_panel section. Section-local object structure is owned by Expression/Front panel.md.

icon.description: Optional icon section. Section-local object structure is owned by Expression/Icon.md.

ide.description: Optional IDE preferences section. Section-local object structure is owned by Expression/IDE preferences.md.

cache.description: Optional cache section. Section-local object structure is owned by Expression/Cache.md.
